title: becium grandiflorum var. stuhlmannii
intro: Becium grandiflorum var. stuhlmannii, also known as African blue basil or East African blue basil, is a plant species in the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Becium grandiflorum var. stuhlmannii include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the leaves of this plant can be used to make teas, infusions, or essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
